description: A client informs their account manager that their primary point of contact has left the company.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the information and ask for the name and details of the new primary contact.

expected_outcome.value: The account manager gathers the new contact's information.

nodes.task_description: Update the primary contact information in the PSA tool.

expected_outcome.value: The client record in the PSA is updated.

nodes.task_description: Send a welcome email to the new primary contact, introducing themself and the service.

expected_outcome.value: A positive relationship is initiated with the new contact.
